recommendations.title: The Other Man
recommendations.overview: The story of a husband who suspects his wife of adultery, and sets out to track down the other man in her life.

recommendations.title: Notes on a Scandal
recommendations.overview: A veteran high school teacher befriends a younger art teacher, who is having an affair with one of her 15-year-old students. However, her intentions with this new "friend" also go well beyond platonic friendship.

recommendations.title: King Lear
recommendations.overview: An aging King invites disaster, when he abdicates to his corrupt, toadying daughters, and rejects his loving and honest one.

recommendations.title: Iris
recommendations.overview: True story of the lifelong romance between novelist Iris Murdoch and her husband John Bayley, from their student days through her battle with Alzheimer's disease.

recommendations.title: Stage Beauty
recommendations.overview: Humble Maria, who outfits top London theater star Ned Kynaston, takes none of the credit for the male actor's success at playing women. And because this is the 17th century, Maria, like other females, is prohibited from pursuing her dream of acting.

recommendations.title: The Fault in Our Stars
recommendations.overview: Despite the tumor-shrinking medical miracle that has bought her a few years, Hazel has never been anything but terminal, her final chapter inscribed upon diagnosis. But when a patient named Augustus Waters suddenly appears at Cancer Kid Support Group

recommendations.title: Minha Vida em Marte
recommendations.overview: Fernanda is married to Tom, with whom she has a five-year-old daughter, Joana. The couple is in the midst of wear and tear caused by living together for many years, which generates constant friction. Who helps Fernanda to overcome the crisis is her p

recommendations.title: Terms of Endearment
recommendations.overview: Aurora, a finicky woman, is in search of true love while her daughter faces marital issues. Together, they help each other deal with problems and find reasons to live a joyful life.

recommendations.title: Far from Heaven
recommendations.overview: In 1950s Connecticut, a housewife's life is upended by a marital crisis and mounting racial tensions in society.

recommendations.title: The King
recommendations.overview: England, 15th century. Hal, a capricious prince who lives among the populace far from court, is forced by circumstances to reluctantly accept the throne and become Henry V.
